summary: Iteration 111: Beverage Operations Extended Features - Backend 24/24 tests PASSED (100%), Frontend 6/6 tabs working. Wine Cellar aging tracker with drinking windows, Cocktail Recipe Costing with 6 cocktails, Seasonal Beverage Programs with 4 seasons and demand forecasting all verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Wine aging calculation correctly uses WINE_REGIONS dict with optimal aging years and peak windows
Wine status correctly calculated: aging (before optimal), peak (in window), past_peak (after window)
Cocktail costing correctly calculates ingredient costs, menu price, profit, and margin percentage
Cocktail costing links to beverage_inventory collection for stock levels and pours available
Seasonal programs have 4 seasons with 3 featured cocktails each, cost/profit calculations included
Seasonal forecast correctly calculates drink mix (45% cocktails, 30% wine, 15% beer, 10% NA) and ordering needs
All MongoDB collections properly exclude _id from responses
Frontend 6-tab panel accessible from sidebar: Culinary Operations > Beverage Operations
seed_data_creation: Created test wines: TEST_Opus One Reserve (2018 Napa Valley), TEST_Chateau Margaux (2015 Bordeaux), TEST_Prosecco Fresh (2024 Veneto). Created test bottle scan: TEST_Tito's Vodka.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 111 tested Beverage Operations Extended Features. All new endpoints working: POST /api/beverage-ops/wine-cellar/add (adds wine with aging calculation), GET /api/beverage-ops/wine-cellar (lists wines with status counts and total value), GET /api/beverage-ops/wine-cellar/pairing-suggestions (returns wine pairings for dishes), GET /api/beverage-ops/cocktail-costing (returns 6 cocktails with full cost breakdown), GET /api/beverage-ops/seasonal-program (returns 4 seasonal programs), POST /api/beverage-ops/seasonal-program/forecast (forecasts demand with ordering needs). Frontend panel has 6 tabs: Bottle Scan, Consumption Bar, Wine Cellar, Cocktail Costing, Seasonal Program, Audits. All tabs accessible and loading data correctly.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/beverage-ops/wine-cellar - lists wines with status and total value - PASSED
GET /api/beverage-ops/wine-cellar/pairing-suggestions?dish=grilled steak - returns red wine pairings - PASSED
GET /api/beverage-ops/wine-cellar/pairing-suggestions?dish=fish - returns white wine pairings - PASSED
GET /api/beverage-ops/wine-cellar/pairing-suggestions?dish=pasta - returns Italian wine pairings - PASSED
Cocktail names verification (6 expected cocktails) - PASSED
frontend_tests: Beverage Operations panel loads from sidebar (Culinary Operations > Beverage Operations) - PASSED
6 tabs found: scan, consumption, cellar, cocktails, seasonal, audits - PASSED
Bottle Scan tab - form with name/level/size/cost inputs, scan button, scans table - PASSED
Cocktail Costing tab - 6 cocktail cards with cost/price/profit displayed - PASSED
Wine Cellar tab - wines table with aging status (PEAK badges), pairing search - PASSED
Seasonal Program tab - 4 seasons with featured cocktails and cost/price - PASSED

features: Add wine with automatic aging calculation
Status determination: aging/peak/past_peak based on WINE_REGIONS dict
Wine pairing suggestions for dishes (steak, fish, chicken, pasta, dessert, bbq)
3 featured cocktails per season with cost/price/profit
forecast_features: Drink mix calculation (cocktails 45%, wine 30%, beer 15%, NA 10%)
Spirit and wine bottle ordering needs

mocked_apis.note: All APIs return real data. Cocktail costing checks beverage_inventory collection for stock levels.
